non_negotiables: One dominant visual thesis per slide.
Use approved assets when available. Do not invent players, jerseys, logos, or numbers.
Every carousel has a premium CTA/end slide.

carousel_cover_v2.purpose: Premium cover with hero visual/logo cluster.

result_slide_v2.purpose: One game with huge score slab.

top_performers_v2.purpose: Top performer context with approved player/logo assets.

roundup_v2.purpose: Multi-result editorial grid. Max six rows per slide.
